title: postgres server vars
description: postgres vars that can be set

POSTGRES_PASSWORD.description: Password for created user inside postgres

POSTGRES_PASSWORD_FILE.description: Password file, its contents used as password for created user inside postgres

POSTGRES_SERVICE_PASSWORD.description: Password for postgres user; fallsback to `POSTGRES_PASSWORD`

LIBSCRIPT_GLOBAL_INSTALL_METHOD.description: Global override for how software should be installed across all systems (e.g. system package manager vs downloaded binaries/from-source).

LIBSCRIPT_WINDOWS_PKG_MGR.description: Global package manager override for Windows targets (e.g. winget, choco).

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

POSTGRES_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for POSTGRES to listen on

POSTGRES_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for POSTGRES to listen on

POSTGRES_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for POSTGRES to listen on

POSTGRES_LOCALE.description: Locale for PostgreSQL initdb (e.g. English, United States)

POSTGRES_SERVICE_RUN_AS_USER.description: Windows local user account to run the service (leave empty for Network Service)

POSTGRES_SERVICE_RUN_AS_PASSWORD.description: Password for the local user account (if applicable)

POSTGRES_SERVICE_NAME.description: Custom name for the Windows Service (allows side-by-side installations)
